name: Philly 3-step Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 package Keebler Ready Crust graham cracker pie crust
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat the cream cheese until smooth and creamy using an electric mixer on medium speed.
2. Add the sugar and vanilla extract, continuing to mix until well combined.
3. Gradually add the eggs, mixing until the batter is smooth and fully incorporated.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie crust.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 40 minutes or until the center is almost set. Allow cooling completely before refrigerating for at least 3 hours, preferably overnight.
6. Once chilled, top with fresh fruit and drizzle with 2 tablespoons melted strawberry jelly.
